title: Canadian Pilaf Bowl
description: A hearty vegan bowl filled with pilaf, roasted vegetables, and a tangy slaw made with Canadian ingredients.

ingredients.name: Canadian slaw (cabbage, apple cider vinegar, maple syrup)

instructions: Toss carrots and sweet potatoes with oil, salt, and pepper. Roast for 20-25 minutes.
Cook pilaf according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat oil over medium heat. Add lentils and cook until lightly browned.
Combine cooked pilaf, lentils, roasted vegetables, and Canadian slaw in a bowl.
Season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
